blocks.text: The report compares two product screenshots and keeps visual metadata separate from inferred image content.
Image metadata: Floating AI toolbar attached to the right page edge
The next screenshot has a label supplied through aria metadata for accessibility tooling.
Image metadata: Side panel chat with structured summary cards
The final image intentionally has no readable metadata and must not be described by the parser.
